llmResponse.agenda_changes: Items 14.3 (Approval of Personnel Report) and 14.4 (Approval of 2020-21 Certificated Seniority Report) were moved from action items to consent items during the 'Changes to the Agenda' section.
llmResponse.consent_vote_words: Trustee Wells. Aye. Trustee Lawson. Hi. Christy Marquez. Aye. Vice President Diaz Locum. Aye. President Nakavoy. Hi.
